headline: Upgraded Guidance And Dividend Hike Could Be A Game Changer For Automatic Data Processing (ADP)
summary: In recent days, Automatic Data Processing reported strong quarterly results, raised its full-year guidance, and once again increased its dividend after more than five decades of consecutive raises, while institutional holder Aberdeen Group slightly trimmed its position. The combination of higher guidance, a larger dividend, and ADP’s role processing payroll for roughly one in six U.S. workers highlights how its cash-generating model and scale continue to underpin its appeal for...

headline: ADP National Employment Report Preliminary Estimate for March 21, 2026
summary: For the four weeks ending March 21, 2026, U.S. private employers added an average of 26,000 jobs per week, according to the NER Pulse, a weekly update of the monthly ADP National Employment Report (NER).
